# Callsign lifecycle: add, attach transponders, scan, FILO inheritance.

# --- 1. callsign add + survey shows zero transponders ---
exec orbiter callsign add acme-keys
stdout 'callsign.*acme-keys.*registered'

exec orbiter survey acme-keys
stdout 'callsign'
stdout 'acme-keys'
stdout 'transponders.*0'

# --- 2. transponder add ---
exec orbiter transponder add corp-gh --role file --brand github --location /tmp/token
stdout 'transponder.*corp-gh.*registered'
stdout 'file/github'

# --- 3. attach transponder → callsign; survey shows 1 transponder ---
exec orbiter attach corp-gh acme-keys
stdout 'attached'

exec orbiter survey acme-keys
stdout 'transponders.*1'

# --- 4. scan callsign direct — runs, exits 0 ---
exec orbiter scan acme-keys
stdout 'file/github'

# --- 5. galaxy + planet hierarchy with callsign + resource ---
exec orbiter galaxy add acme-corp
exec orbiter planet add payments-api --galaxy acme-corp

exec orbiter attach acme-keys payments-api
stdout 'attached'

exec orbiter resource add git-tool --role tool --brand git
exec orbiter attach git-tool payments-api

# scan planet — both resource and transponder (via callsign) are visible
exec orbiter scan payments-api
stdout 'tool/git'

# survey planet shows transponders >= 1 (via attached callsign)
exec orbiter survey payments-api
stdout 'transponders.*[1-9]'

# --- 6. Galaxy-level callsign flows down to planet with no own callsign ---
exec orbiter galaxy add beta-corp
exec orbiter callsign add beta-keys
exec orbiter transponder add beta-gh --role file --brand github --location /tmp/beta-token
exec orbiter attach beta-gh beta-keys
exec orbiter attach beta-keys beta-corp
exec orbiter planet add beta-api --galaxy beta-corp

# scan planet inherits galaxy callsign → exits 0
exec orbiter scan beta-api
stdout 'file/github|no resources attached'

# --- 7. Direct transponder on planet supersedes callsign lookup ---
# Use a different brand so we can assert both are visible (callsign's file/github AND direct file/gitea)
exec orbiter transponder add direct-gitea --role file --brand gitea --location /tmp/gitea-token
exec orbiter attach direct-gitea beta-api

exec orbiter scan beta-api
stdout 'file/github'
stdout 'file/gitea'
